attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
	ITEM_KEY,
	COALESCE(MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG ,'N') AS MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
	ITEM_REQUESTED_DT ,
	ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
	COALESCE(GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCIFC_FLG,'N') AS GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCIFC_FLG,
	COALESCE(DEACTIVATED_ROLE ,'N') AS DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
	COALESCE(ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, -999) AS ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,-999) AS ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	EDW_CREATE_USER,
	EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	START_TV_DTM,
	END_TV_DTM,
	DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
	DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
	COALESCE(MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,'N' ) AS MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
    COALESCE(CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
    COALESCE(ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
    COALESCE(PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_STATUS_CD ,
    COALESCE(AUDIT_FLG,'N') AS AUDIT_FLG ,
    COALESCE(GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,'N') AS GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG ,
	COALESCE(LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD ,
    COALESCE(KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,'N') AS KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
    COALESCE(DASHBOARD_FLG,'N') AS  DASHBOARD_FLG ,
    COALESCE(REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD ,
    COALESCE(ITEM_REMOVED_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT, DATE '3500-01-01') AS ITEM_REMOVED_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
    COALESCE(DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
	COALESCE(WORKBENCH_FLG,'N') AS WORKBENCH_FLG,
	SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM  AS SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
	DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT AS DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
	SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM AS SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
	DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT AS DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
	COALESCE(SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
	COALESCE(SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
	COALESCE(GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
	COALESCE(GTC_ITEM_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') AS GTC_ITEM_DESCR,
	'I'AS ACTION_CODE,
	DML_TYPE
FROM	 (
	SELECT	
		TV_OUT.ITEM_KEY,
		TV_OUT.MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
		TV_OUT.ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
		TV_OUT.ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
		TV_OUT.GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCIFC_FLG,
		TV_OUT.DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
		TV_OUT.ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
		TV_OUT.ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
		TV_OUT.RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
		TV_OUT.RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
		USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
		USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
		TV_OUT.START_TV_DTM,
		COALESCE (MAX(TV_OUT.START_TV_DTM - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TV_OUT.ITEM_KEY ORDER BY TV_OUT.START_TV_DTM ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING
				AND	1 FOLLOWING),TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS END_TV_DTM,
		TV_OUT.DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
		TV_OUT.DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
		TV_OUT.MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
		TV_OUT.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
        TV_OUT.ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
        TV_OUT.PRODUCT_STATUS_CD ,
        TV_OUT.AUDIT_FLG ,
        TV_OUT.GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG ,
	    TV_OUT.LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD ,
        TV_OUT.KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
        TV_OUT.DASHBOARD_FLG ,
        TV_OUT.REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD ,
        TV_OUT.ITEM_REMOVED_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
        TV_OUT.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
		TV_OUT.WORKBENCH_FLG,
		TV_OUT.SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
		TV_OUT.DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
		TV_OUT.SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
		TV_OUT.DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
		TV_OUT.SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
		TV_OUT.SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
		TV_OUT.GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
		TV_OUT.GTC_ITEM_DESCR,
		ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TV_OUT.ITEM_KEY ORDER	BY TV_OUT.START_TV_DTM ASC ) AS RANK_INDEX,
		(CASE	WHEN RANK_INDEX=1 AND	NICTV.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) DML_TYPE
	FROM	(
		SELECT	
		ITEM_KEY,
		MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
		ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
		ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
		GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCIFC_FLG,
		DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
		ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
		ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
		RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
		RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
		START_TV_DTM,
		DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
		DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
	    MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
		CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
        ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
        PRODUCT_STATUS_CD ,
        AUDIT_FLG ,
        GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG ,
	    LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD ,
        KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
        DASHBOARD_FLG ,
        REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD ,
        ITEM_REMOVED_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
        DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
	    WORKBENCH_FLG,
		SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
		DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
		SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
		DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
		SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
		SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
		GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
		GTC_ITEM_DESCR,
		ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TV_IN.ITEM_KEY,
						TV_IN.MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
						TV_IN.ITEM_REQUESTED_DT ,
						TV_IN.ITEM_APPROVED_DT ,
						TV_IN.GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCIFC_FLG,
						TV_IN.DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
						TV_IN.ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
						TV_IN.ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
						TV_IN.RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
						TV_IN.RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
						TV_IN.PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,
						TV_IN.AUDIT_FLG,
						TV_IN.KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
	                    TV_IN.WORKBENCH_FLG,
		                TV_IN.SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
		                TV_IN.DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
		                TV_IN.SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
		                TV_IN.DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
		                TV_IN.SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
		                TV_IN.SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,	
				        TV_IN.GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
				        TV_IN.GTC_ITEM_DESCR						
					ORDER	BY TV_IN.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) AS ROW_NUM
		FROM	
		(
			SELECT	
				NP.ITEM_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
				COALESCE(SXCI.MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLAG,'N') AS MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
				SXCI.REQUESTED_DATE AS ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
				SXCI.ITEM_APPROVED_DATE AS ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
				COALESCE(SXCI.GENUINE_MISMATCH,	'N') AS GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCIFC_FLG,
				(CASE	WHEN SXCI.DEACTIVATED_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
				COALESCE(NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
				COALESCE(NCWP3.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
				SXCI.DEACTIVATED_DATE AS RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
				COALESCE(NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
				CREATE_DATETIME  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
				CAST(SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as START_TV_DTM,
				COALESCE(CASE INDEX(SUBSTR(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,INDEX(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,'-') +1) ,'-')
							WHEN 0 THEN NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID 
							ELSE SUBSTR(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,1,INDEX(SUBSTR(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,INDEX(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,'-') +1) ,'-') +
							INDEX(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,'-') -1) END, 'UNKNOWN') AS DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
			    (CASE INDEX(SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,INDEX(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'-') +1) ,'-') 
				WHEN 0 THEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
				ELSE SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,INDEX(SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,INDEX(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'-') +1) ,'-') + INDEX(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'-') -1)
				END ) AS DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
				COALESCE(SXCI.MANUAL_IMP_FLAG,'N' ) AS MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
                COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
                COALESCE(NCIS.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
                COALESCE(SXCI.PID_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_STATUS_CD ,
                COALESCE(SXCI.AUDIT_FLAG,'N') AS AUDIT_FLG ,
                COALESCE(SXCI.GPL_FLAG,'N') AS GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG ,
                COALESCE(SXCI.LINE_OF_BUSINESS,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD ,
                COALESCE(SXCI.KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLAG,'N') AS KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
                COALESCE(SXCI.DASHBOARD_FLAG,'N') AS  DASHBOARD_FLG ,
                COALESCE(SXCI.REASON,'UNKNOWN') AS REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD ,
                COALESCE(SXCI.REMOVED_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01') AS ITEM_REMOVED_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
                COALESCE(SXCI.DELIVERY_OPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
				COALESCE(SXCI.WORKBENCH_FLAG,'N') AS WORKBENCH_FLG,
				SXCI.CREATED_DATE AS SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
			     cast(SXCI.CREATED_DATE as date) AS DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
				SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE AS SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
			cast(SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE as date)  AS  DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
				COALESCE(SXCI.MODIFIED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS  SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
				COALESCE(SXCI.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS  SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
				COALESCE(CASE WHEN  SXCI.ITEM_FLAG='P' THEN 'Product' WHEN  SXCI.ITEM_FLAG='C' THEN 'Part' WHEN SXCI.ITEM_FLAG='N' THEN 'Non-Prod' END, 'UNKNOWN')    AS GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
				COALESCE(SXCI.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS GTC_ITEM_DESCR

				FROM	 $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS  SXCI
				
				LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS	
				ON COALESCE(SXCI.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,-999) = NCIS.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
				
				LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2
				ON COALESCE(SXCI.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID,-999)  = NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
				
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
				ON (SXCI.ITEM_NAME = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
					
				LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
				ON (NCWP1.CEC_ID = COALESCE(SXCI.DEACTIVATED_BY,'UNKNOWN'))  

				LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
				ON (NCWP2.CEC_ID = COALESCE(SXCI.ITEM_APPROVER,'UNKNOWN'))  

				LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3
				ON (NCWP3.CEC_ID = COALESCE(SXCI.REQUESTOR,'UNKNOWN'))  

				WHERE	  SOURCE1 = 'CISCO'

		UNION ALL
		
			SELECT	NP.ITEM_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
				COALESCE(EXCI.MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLAG,'N') AS MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
				EXCI.REQUESTED_DATE AS ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
				EXCI.ITEM_APPROVED_DATE AS ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
				COALESCE(EXCI.GENUINE_MISMATCH,	'N') AS GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCIFC_FLG,
				(CASE	WHEN EXCI.DEACTIVATED_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
				COALESCE(NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
				COALESCE(NCWP3.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
				EXCI.DEACTIVATED_DATE AS RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
				COALESCE(NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,	-999) AS RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
				CREATE_DATETIME  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
				CAST(EXCI.MODIFIED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as START_TV_DTM,
				COALESCE(CASE INDEX(SUBSTR(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,INDEX(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,'-') +1) ,'-')
							WHEN 0 THEN NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID 
							ELSE SUBSTR(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,1,INDEX(SUBSTR(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,INDEX(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,'-') +1) ,'-') +
							INDEX(NP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,'-') -1) END, 'UNKNOWN') AS DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
				(CASE INDEX(SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,INDEX(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'-') +1) ,'-') 
				WHEN 0 THEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
				ELSE SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,INDEX(SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,INDEX(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'-') +1) ,'-') + INDEX(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'-') -1)
				END ) AS DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
				COALESCE(EXCI.MANUAL_IMP_FLAG,'N' ) AS MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
                COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
                COALESCE(NCIS.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
                COALESCE(EXCI.PID_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_STATUS_CD ,
                COALESCE(EXCI.AUDIT_FLAG,'N') AS AUDIT_FLG ,
                COALESCE(EXCI.GPL_FLAG,'N') AS GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG ,
                COALESCE(EXCI.LINE_OF_BUSINESS,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD ,
                COALESCE(EXCI.KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLAG,'N') AS KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
                COALESCE(EXCI.DASHBOARD_FLAG,'N') AS  DASHBOARD_FLG ,
                COALESCE(EXCI.REASON,'UNKNOWN') AS REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD ,
                COALESCE(EXCI.REMOVED_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01') AS ITEM_REMOVED_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
                COALESCE(EXCI.DELIVERY_OPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
				COALESCE(EXCI.WORKBENCH_FLAG,'N') AS WORKBENCH_FLG,
				EXCI.CREATED_DATE AS SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
				CAST(EXCI.CREATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
				EXCI.MODIFIED_DATE  AS SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
				CAST(EXCI.MODIFIED_DATE AS DATE) AS  DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
				COALESCE(EXCI.MODIFIED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS  SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
				COALESCE(EXCI.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS  SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
				COALESCE(CASE WHEN  EXCI.ITEM_FLAG='P' THEN 'Product' WHEN  EXCI.ITEM_FLAG='C' THEN 'Part' WHEN EXCI.ITEM_FLAG='N' THEN 'Non-Prod' END, 'UNKNOWN')    AS GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
				COALESCE(EXCI.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS GTC_ITEM_DESCR
				
				
			FROM	 $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS_CUSTOMS  EXCI
				
				LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS
				ON COALESCE(EXCI.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,-999) = NCIS.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT	
				 
				LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2
				ON COALESCE(EXCI.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID,-999)  = NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT				
				
				
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
				ON (EXCI.ITEM_NAME = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
				
						
				LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
				ON (NCWP1.CEC_ID = COALESCE(EXCI.DEACTIVATED_BY,'UNKNOWN')) 
				

				LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
				ON (NCWP2.CEC_ID = COALESCE(EXCI.ITEM_APPROVER,'UNKNOWN'))  

				LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3
				ON (NCWP3.CEC_ID = COALESCE(EXCI.REQUESTOR,'UNKNOWN'))  
					
									
			WHERE	  SOURCE1 = 'CISCO'
			  AND     EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
			
			UNION ALL
			SELECT	ITEM_KEY,
				MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
				ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
				ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
				GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG AS GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCIFC_FLG,
				DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
				ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
				ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
				RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
				RU_DCTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
				EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
				START_TV_DTM,
				DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
				DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
				MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
				CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
				ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
				PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,
				AUDIT_FLG,
				GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,
				LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,
				KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
				DASHBOARD_FLG,
				REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,
				ITEM_REMOVED_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
				DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
				WORKBENCH_FLG,
		        SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
		        DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
		        SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
		        DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
		        SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
				SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
				GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
				GTC_ITEM_DESCR
				
			FROM	 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CUSTOMS_TV NICTV
			WHERE	END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
				AND	EXISTS
					(
					SELECT	1
					FROM	     (
						SELECT	ITEM_NAME
						FROM	$$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS
						WHERE	SOURCE1 = 'CISCO'
						UNION
						       SELECT ITEM_NAME
						FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS_CUSTOMS
						WHERE	SOURCE1 = 'CISCO'
					)SXCI
					INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP       	
						ON (SXCI.ITEM_NAME = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
					WHERE	NICTV.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
					)
		)TV_IN
		QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TV_IN.ITEM_KEY, TV_IN.START_TV_DTM ORDER BY TV_IN.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) = 1
		)TV_OUT
		LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CUSTOMS_TV NICTV
			ON ( TV_OUT.ITEM_KEY = NICTV.ITEM_KEY
			AND NICTV.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
	WHERE	TV_OUT.ROW_NUM = 1
	)TV

SELECT	
	ITEM_ID ,
	ITEM_NAME ,
	ITEM_DESCRIPTION ,
	BUSINESS_UNIT ,
	PRODUCT_FAMILY ,
	LINE_OF_BUSINESS ,
	FCS_DATE ,
	INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,
	ITEM_TYPE ,
	ITEM_STATUS ,
	SOURCE1 ,
	ERP_SPECIFIC ,
	PT_CC ,
	REQUESTOR ,
	REQUESTED_DATE ,
	MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLAG ,
	PRODUCT_FAMILY_DESCRIPTION ,
	BRAND_NAME ,
	ITEM_APPROVER ,
	ITEM_APPROVED_DATE ,
	SOFTWARE_CATEGORY ,
	BASE_PID ,
	ITEM_FLAG ,
	INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE ,
	BATCH_ID ,
	OVERRIDE_FLAG ,
	AUDITOR_COMMENTS ,
	CUSTOM_SPECIFIC ,
	GENUINE_MISMATCH ,
	CREATED_BY ,
	CREATED_DATE ,
	MODIFIED_BY ,
	MODIFIED_DATE ,
	DEACTIVATED_BY ,
	DEACTIVATED_DATE ,
	USER_INTERFACE ,
	CUSTOM_KIT_FLAG ,
	NAFTA_FLAG ,
	CREATE_DATETIME ,
	ACTION_CODE ,
	'RI',
	MANUAL_IMP_FLAG,
	GPL_FLAG,
	PID_STATUS,
	AUDIT_FLAG,
	KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLAG,
	DASHBOARD_FLAG,
	WORKBENCH_FLAG,
	REASON,
	REMOVED_DATE,
	DELIVERY_OPTION,
	ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
	CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS SXCI
WHERE	SOURCE1 = 'CISCO'
AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 
				FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 				WHERE (SXCI.ITEM_NAME = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
	)
